resources.string: Your message to \'%s\' has not been sent
No stored conversations have been found
Show a character counter at writing messages
Unable to compress image to selected size
Only you can see this conversation name
You must pick a time in the future
Keep the phone on and make sure there is nothing killing the app while in background.
No archived conversations have been found
The archive has been emptied successfully
Are you sure you want to empty the archive? All archived conversations will be permanently lost.
Are you sure you want to empty the Recycle Bin? The messages will be permanently lost.
Skip the Recycle Bin, delete messages directly
Are you sure you want to delete all messages of this conversation?
Are you sure you want to archive %s?
Are you sure you want to restore all messages of this conversation?
Are you sure you want to restore %s?
You are not blocking any keywords. You may add keywords here to block all messages containing them.
Remove accents and diacritics at sending messages
You have to select at least one item
Can\'t send message to an empty number
Unable to save message to the telephony database
Couldn\'t send message, radio turned off
Can\'t reply to short codes like this
You can only reply to short codes with numbers like \"503501\" but not to codes containing letters and numbers like \"AB-CD0\".
Attachment size exceeds max MMS limit
Why does the app require access to the internet?

Sadly it is needed for sending MMS attachments. Not being able to send MMS would be a really huge disadvantage compared to other apps, so we decided to go this way. However, as usually, there are no ads, tracking or analytics whatsoever, the internet is used only for sending MMS.
The other end is not receiving my MMS, is there anything I can do about it?
MMS size is limited by carriers, you can try setting a smaller limit in the app settings.
Does the app support scheduled messages?
Yes, you can schedule messages to be sent in the future by long pressing the Send button and picking the desired date and time.
Why do my group message replies appear as individual texts to recipients?
You need to enable \"Send group messages as MMS\" in the app settings. This will ensure that group messages are sent as proper MMS, allowing all participants to see each other\'s replies.
The app could not access your contacts
App does not have the permission to initiate phone calls, please grant it in the device settings
Phone storage (not visible by other apps)
No phone number has been found
You have to make this app the default dialer app to make use of blocked numbers.
Are you sure you want to block \"%s\"?
Enter a number or a pattern (e.g. *12345*, +1*8888) to block all calls and messages from numbers matching the pattern.
Can\'t block unknown numbers without caller ID permission.
Type in at least 2 characters to start the search.
You must allow the app displaying notifications, else it cannot show reminders.
You must allow the app displaying full screen notifications, else you may miss some reminders.
You must allow the app displaying notifications, else it cannot show the progress bar.
You must allow the app displaying notifications, else it cannot play songs.
You must allow the app displaying notifications, else it cannot record audio.
You must allow the app displaying notifications, else it cannot show incoming calls.
You must allow the app displaying full screen notifications, else you may miss some incoming calls.
You must allow the app displaying notifications, else it cannot show incoming messages.
You must allow the app accessing internal alarms, else it cannot send scheduled messages.
You must allow the app accessing internal alarms, else it cannot turn off the application after sleep timer.
You must allow the app accessing your location, else it won\'t know it.
Folder name must not be empty
A folder with that name already exists
Cannot rename the root folder of a storage

%Y - year
%M - month
%D - day
%h - hour
%m - minute
%s - second
%i - number increasing from 1
Starting from Android 11 you cannot hide files and folders like that anymore
Could not write to the selected destination
Source and destination cannot be the same
Some files could not be moved
Some files could not be copied
No new items have been found
The destination does not have enough space available.\nRequired %1$s, available %2$s
System service for selecting files and folders is unavailable
A file or folder with that name already exists
The system does not allow the operation in this folder, please pick another one
The system does not allow copying into this folder, please pick another one
The system does not allow renaming in this folder
Cannot rename folders directly on internal storage, only subfolders
Please choose the top folder of the SD card on the next screen, to grant write access
If you don\'t see the SD card, try this
Please allow the app accessing the selected storage on the next screen by pressing \'Use this folder\' at the bottom.
Please allow access to \'%s\' on the next screen by pressing \'Use this folder\' at the bottom.
Due to system restrictions, this folder is not available.
A system file manager app could not be found.
Please press \'Save\' at the bottom of the next screen to create the new folder.
Please grant our app access to all your files, it might not work well without it.
Wrong folder selected, please select the main folder of your SD card
SD card and USB device paths cannot be the same

You seem to have the app installed on an SD card, that makes the app widgets unavailable. You won\'t even see them on the list of available widgets. It is a system limitation, so if you want to use the widgets, you have to move the app back on the internal storage.
Wrong folder selected, please select path \'%s\'
Are you sure you want to remove EXIF values like GPS coordinates, camera model etc?
Accent color of Black & White theme
Changing a color will make it switch to Custom theme
Are you sure you want to undo your changes?
You have unsaved changes. Save before exit?
Apply theme to all Fossify Apps

Caution: Certain launchers may not handle app icon customization correctly. If the icon disappears, attempt launching the app through Google Play or a widget, if accessible. After launching, restore the default green icon color #106D1F. In extreme cases, reinstalling the app may be necessary.
The current theme has been successfully applied to all Fossify apps. Any future changes to this theme will be synced automatically.
Note that even though you are using the Pro app version, you still need Fossify Thank You for technical reasons. It takes care of the color synchronization.
You cannot share this much content at once
Empty and disable the Recycle Bin
Sort numeric parts by actual value
Are you sure you want to proceed with the deletion?
Are you sure you want to delete %s?
Are you sure you want to move %s into the Recycle Bin?
Are you sure you want to delete this item?
Are you sure you want to move this item into the Recycle Bin?
Do not ask again in this session
PIN must be at least 4 digits long
Too many incorrect unlock attempts.\nTry again in %d seconds.
Please place your finger on the fingerprint sensor
Authentication blocked, please try again in a moment
You have no fingerprints registered, please add some in the Settings of your device
Password setup successfully. Please reinstall the app in case you forget it.
Protection setup successfully. Please reinstall the app in case of problems with resetting it.
This protection works in this app only, it is not supposed to replace a real systemwide folder encryption.
Time remaining till the alarm goes off:\n%s
Time remaining till the reminder triggers:\n%s
Please make sure the alarm works properly before relying on it. It could misbehave due to system restrictions related to battery saving.

Please make sure the reminders work properly before relying on them. Check your device battery and notification settings, if there is nothing blocking the reminders, or killing the app in the background.
Notifications of this application are disabled. Please go in your device settings for enabling them.
Password protect file deletion and moving
Keep old last-modified value at file operations
Show an info bubble at scrolling items by scrollbar dragging
Prevent phone from sleeping while the app is in foreground
Move deleted items to recycle bin
Show a call confirmation dialog before initiating a call
Remove all folders from the list of excluded? This will not delete the folders.
Tab to open at app start
The Recycle Bin has been emptied successfully
Are you sure you want to empty the Recycle Bin? The files will be permanently lost.
Moving recycle bin items is disabled. Please use Restore.
Skip the Recycle Bin, delete files directly

plurals.name: moving_items_into_bin
plurals.item: Moving %d item into the Recycle Bin
Moving %d items into the Recycle Bin

resources.string: No entries for importing have been found
No new entries for importing have been found
No entries for exporting have been found

You can use the following patterns to name your file automatically:

%Y - year
%M - month
%D - day
%h - hour
%m - minute
%s - second
You seem to have an USB device attached to your device. To make sure its files appear properly, you need to grant additional permissions.
Please choose the top folder of the USB device on the next screen, to grant access
Wrong folder selected, please select the main folder of your USB device
Your app version will not be updated anymore. Please upgrade to the Pro version to receive new fixes and other improvements.
Your app version will not be updated anymore. Please upgrade to the Pro version to receive new fixes and other improvements by clicking here.
It is free till: %s. If you download it till then, you will be able to use it for free forever.
You have to migrate locally stored events manually via exporting in an .ics file, then importing. You can find both export/import buttons at the main screen menu.

Hello,

seems like you just upgraded from the free version. Once you are happy with this one and maybe migrated your settings and favorites over, you can uninstall the old free one to avoid launching it accidentally as you will not need it anymore, it will also prevent this dialog from showing up.

Thanks!

Hello,

seems like you already have the Pro app version too. Once you are happy with it and maybe migrated your settings and favorites over, you can uninstall this one to avoid launching it accidentally as you will not need it anymore.

Thanks!

Hello,

seems like you just upgraded from the free version. Once you are happy with this one and maybe migrated your data over, you can uninstall the old free one to avoid launching it accidentally as you will not need it anymore, it will also prevent this dialog from showing up.

Thanks!

Hello,

seems like you already have the Pro app version too. Once you are happy with it and maybe migrated your data over, you can uninstall this one to avoid launching it accidentally as you will not need it anymore.

Thanks!

Hello,

seems like you just upgraded from the free version. If you want to migrate your locally stored events over, you have to do it manually by exporting them into an .ics file in the free app version and importing here through the top menu. 

Once you are satisfied with your setup in the Pro version, you can uninstall the old free one as you won't need it anymore, it will also prevent this dialog from showing up.

Thanks!

Hello,

seems like you just upgraded from the free version. If you had any contacts stored under "%s", you have to migrate them manually by exporting in a .vcf file from the free app version and importing here through the top menu.

Once you are satisfied with your setup in the Pro version, you can uninstall the old free one as you won't need it anymore, it will also prevent this dialog from showing up.

Thanks!

Hello,

seems like you just upgraded from the free version. If you want to migrate your notes over, you have to do it manually by exporting them into a file in the free app version and importing here through the top menu. 

Once you are satisfied with your setup in the Pro version, you can uninstall the old free one as you won't need it anymore, it will also prevent this dialog from showing up.

Thanks!
Send your feedback or suggestions to

Hello,

hope you are enjoying the app. It contains no ads, please support its development by purchasing the Fossify Thank You app, it will also prevent this dialog from showing up again.

Thank you!

Hello,

hope you are enjoying the app. It contains no ads and we aren\'t collecting your data either, please support its development by purchasing Fossify Thank You. You will also have all app features including color customization unlocked.

Thank you!
Support us by purchasing Fossify Thank You please, it will also unlock all app features including color customization.
Please update Fossify Thank You to the latest version
Before you ask a question, please check the app settings and read the Frequently Asked Questions first. Maybe the solution is there.
Also make sure that you are using the latest app version.
Also note that this app version is no longer being developed, get the Pro one for many improvements.
The widget is locked.\nPlease upgrade to the Pro version to unlock it.

This feature is locked, please purchase Fossify Thank You for unlocking the full app.

It is a one time payment only and if you won\'t be satisfied, we can refund you.

Hey,

just letting you know that some new apps have been released recently:

%2$s

%4$s

%6$s

You can download them by pressing their titles or icons.

Thanks
It looks like your app version is corrupt. Please download the original version here.
Before you ask a question, please first read the
How come I don\'t see this apps widget on the list of widgets?

It is most likely because you moved the app on an SD card. There is an Android system limitation which hides the given app widgets in that case. The only solution is to move the app back onto the Internal Storage via your device settings.
I want to support you, but I cannot donate money. Is there anything else I can do?

Yes, of course. You can spread the word about the apps or give good feedback and ratings. You can also help by translating the apps in a new language, or just update some existing translations. The guide to translating is at this website, or just contact us at hello@fossify.org if you have any questions.
I deleted some files by mistake, how can I recover them?
Sadly, you cannot. Files are deleted instantly after the confirmation dialog, there is no trashbin available.
I don\'t like the widget colors, can I change them?

Yep, as you drag a widget on your home screen a widget config screen appears. You will see colored squares at the bottom left corner, just press them to pick a new color. You can use the slider for adjusting the alpha too.
Can I somehow restore deleted files?
If they were really deleted, you cannot recover them. However, the recycle bin is enabled by default and moves files into the bin instead of deleting them immediately.
The app launcher icon disappeared. What can I do?

This issue arises when your launcher does not fully support icon customization. Attempt launching the app through Google Play or a widget, if accessible. After launching, restore the default green icon color #106D1F. In extreme cases, reinstalling the app may be necessary.
The money has been deducted from my bank account, but I cannot download the app. What can I do?
Payments are fully handled by Google, their system glitches from time to time. Just clear your Google Play app cache and restart your device, then retry downloading it.
Why should I upgrade to the Pro version?

As your app version is no longer updated, the bugs you have maybe spotted will never be fixed. There will also be no new functions added. You can purchase the Pro version on Google Play for a small sum of money. It is a one time payment, which means that once you purchase it, you will never have to pay again. Not even after getting a new device. If you won\'t like the Pro version, you can just uninstall it within a few hours and you will automatically get your money back. If you want a refund anytime later, just contact us at hello@fossify.org and you will get it.
How can I select multiple items at once?

There are multiple ways of doing that. The first one is starting the selection mode by long pressing one item, then short clicking on others to select them. The second way is similar to selecting items on PCs with a mouse, just start the selection mode by long pressing one item, then with your finger still down drag it across other items for selecting. The third way of selecting multiple items is long pressing one item, then long pressing another one and everything in between gets selected. If you want to select all items, just long press one item, then click at the selected item counter at the top left corner. That will select or unselect all everything.
I have purchased the app, but I cannot download it on another device.
Try clearing your Google Play app cache and restarting your device. It is some Google Play glitch, not really related to the app itself.

This list contains everyone that noticeably helped any app within the Fossify suite, not only this one. Translations are handled by volunteers, let us know if you want to help too. The guide to translating is at this website, or just contact us at hello@fossify.org if you have any questions. Thanks to all contributors and other supporters!
Optional private contact sharing within our apps
Different note and colors per widget
Android Image Cropper (image crop and rotate)
Unlock the app for one final day

Thank you for using our app. You can use this unlocked version for <font color='#FFFFFF'>%d days</font>. Once the trial ends, please consider upgrading to the Pro version. It has a huge amount of new features, modern design, no ads and many other improvements. 

You just have to pay for it once in a lifetime and if you won't be satisfied, you can uninstall it and get a refund.

Hope you'll like it :)

Please upgrade to the Pro version to enjoy the app to the fullest.

You just have to pay for it once in a lifetime and if you won't be satisfied, you can uninstall it and get a refund.

See you there :)
DEPRECATED: This version of the app is no longer maintained, get the Pro version at https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.fossify..xxx.pro

Don\'t forget that if you uninstall any paid app within 2 hours, you will automatically be refunded. If you want a refund anytime later, just contact us at hello@fossify.org and you will get it. That makes it easy to try it out :)
A group of simple, open source Android apps with customizable widgets, without ads and unnecessary permissions.
Are you sure you want to unblock \"%s\"?
Hide the top app bar when scrolling
Get the paid app to support future developments and extra features
Get one of our paid apps to support future development and unlock extra features
Carefully selected application themes, automatic theme changer and system theme support for Android 12+
Manual adjustment of the primary color, accent, background, text and navigation bar
With your help we can implement more features and make the application even better
If you made purchases in our old version or supported the project on other platforms, please send us some confirmation by email and we will try to send you a promo code

To receive a promo code, you must send confirmation of your support for the project (a screenshot from Google Play or another platform is sufficient). The number of promo codes is limited. Send confirmation?

We value your time and want you to enjoy our app without ads. If it has brought you pleasure and usefulness, consider donating to its development.

Appreciate our hard work and share your impressions, it will help us to realize new ideas and offer you even more amazing features.
If for some reason you can\'t afford our app, but really want to use all the features, just email us
Choose the level of project support available to you (one-time, monthly or yearly). Any support unlocks all features of the application. You can cancel your subscription at any time.

For those who do not use Google Play, it is possible to unlock all functions of the application.
If you like our apps which are offline, non-intrusive and have no ads, please consider supporting us in some way. We would be very grateful.

Thank you!

Due to issues we are temporarily unable to make payments through Google Play, so for this period we are giving all users the option to manually unlock all features of the app.
If you like our apps which are offline, non-intrusive and have no ads, please consider supporting us in some way. We would be very grateful.

Thank you!
Restored previous purchase. Please restart the app to make use of all features.
Select of themes and interface colors
This theme does not allow you to adjust colors manually. Colors change dynamically depending on your system settings.
Additional colour used in some interface elements.

Caution: Certain launchers may not handle app icon customization correctly. If the icon disappears, attempt launching the app through Google Play or a widget, if accessible. After launching, restore the default app icon color. In extreme cases, reinstalling the app may be necessary.
Caution: Changing app icon will remove the app shortcuts.
Starting from Android 10+, the app does not have access to your files
The play/pause icon is colored in the primary color
Icons instead of text on tabs
The tab bar will move to the bottom
Open a search when you open the contacts tab
Change top bar colour when scrolling
The current theme has been successfully applied to all Right apps. Any future changes to this theme will be synced automatically.
Colored icons of the app top bar
Show the button not to hide blocked calls
Folder to open at app start
This will disable gesture swiping of tabs
Please update Goodwy Thank You to the latest version

Yes, of course. You can spread the word about the apps or give good feedback and ratings. You can also help by translating the apps in a new language, or just update some existing translations. You can find the guide at this website, or just shoot me a message at goodwy.dev@gmail.com if you need help.

This issue arises when your launcher does not fully support icon customization. Attempt launching the app through Google Play or a widget, if accessible. After launching, restore the default app icon color. In extreme cases, reinstalling the app may be necessary.

As your app version is no longer updated, the bugs you have maybe spotted will never be fixed. There will also be no new functions added. You can purchase the Pro version on Google Play for a small sum of money. It is a one time payment, which means that once you purchase it, you will never have to pay again. Not even after getting a new device. If you won\'t like the Pro version, you can just uninstall it within a few hours and you will automatically get your money back. If you want a refund anytime later, just contact us at goodwy.dev@gmail.com and you will get it.

A private contact is created within an application. This contact will not be visible to other applications (except for our apps when a special setting is enabled). If you uninstall the app, all private contacts will be deleted along with the app, so back up your contacts before uninstalling the app.
How to create a private contact?
When you create a contact, you must select the source of the contact: %s
Shows contact\'s nicknames (when available) instead of their first names
Build a collection to unlock the app

Hey,

if you like this app, we recommend that you install our app to view and edit contacts.

Thanks

Hey,

if you like this app, we recommend that you install our call app.

Thanks

Hey,

if you like this app, we recommend that you install our messaging app.

Thanks

Hey,

if you like this app, we recommend that you install our photo viewing and editing app.

Thanks
Sorry, I can\'t talk right now.
Sets whether the incoming call should be disconnected as if the user does not answer
Sets whether the incoming call should be disconnected as if the user had manually rejected it
Sets whether ringing should be silenced for the incoming call
Calls and messages from blocked numbers will not be received.
Messages from blocked numbers will not be received.
When disabled, all blocking settings will be removed for calls. Messages will still be blocked for numbers on the blocked list. You can add a quick settings tile for easy switching.
Calls from unsaved numbers will be blocked and displayed on the Recents list. Incoming calls will continue to ring from people in your contacts and recent outgoing calls.
Do not block contacts and recent outgoing calls
To pay via RuStore you need to install the app version from RuStore
